name: WebCorps Project Hunting Agent v2 (Zero Budget)

nodes.name: Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours automatically. You can change the interval here.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: ALL configuration lives here. Update: apify_api_token, google_sheet_id, gemini_api_key, team_email, maps_search_query

nodes.name: Upwork RSS Fetch
nodes.notes: Fetches Upwork RSS feed. No API key needed - this is publicly accessible. To get your own RSS URL: Upwork > Find Work > search keywords > Save Search > RSS

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

nodes.name: Fiverr Search Fetch
nodes.notes: Scrapes Fiverr public search results. No login needed for gig search. To change what is searched, update 'fiverr_search_url' in the Config node.

parameters.value:
={
  "searchStringsArray": [
    "{{ $('Config').first().json.maps_search_query }}",
    "clinic in {{ $('Config').first().json.maps_search_city }}",
    "salon in {{ $('Config').first().json.maps_search_city }}",
    "law firm in {{ $('Config').first().json.maps_search_city }}"
  ],
  "maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch": 10,
  "language": "en",
  "exportPlaceUrls": false,
  "includeHistogram": false,
  "includeOpeningHours": false,
  "includePeopleAlsoSearch": false,
  "additionalInfo": false
}

nodes.name: Apify Google Maps Scraper
nodes.notes: Uses Apify's free Google Maps Scraper actor (nwua9Gu5YrADL7ZDj). Free plan gives $5 credits/month — enough for ~400 place lookups. Sign up at apify.com, get API token, paste in Config node.

nodes.name: Read Existing Leads
nodes.notes: Reads existing leads to prevent duplicates. Create a Google Sheet with a tab called 'Leads'. Share it with your Google account.

nodes.name: Generate Message (Gemini Free)
nodes.notes: Uses Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite — FREE tier. 1,000 requests/day, 15 RPM. Get API key from: aistudio.google.com > Get API Key. Paste it in the Config node.

nodes.name: Send Gmail
nodes.notes: Add your Gmail OAuth2 credential in n8n. Settings > Credentials > Add > Google OAuth2.

parameters.subject: =🔥 High Priority Lead: {{ $json.title.substring(0, 60) }}
parameters.message:
=

🔥 High Priority Lead Found

Platform{{ $json.platform }}
Project / Business{{ $json.title }}
Matched Service{{ $json.matched_service }}
Budget{{ $json.budget }}
Contact{{ $json.contact }}
LinkView Lead →

Outreach Message Sent:

{{ $json.email_body }}

View Leads Sheet →

nodes.name: Alert Team (High Priority)
nodes.notes: Sends a beautiful HTML alert email to your team for every High Priority lead.
